description: The Lanzino 'ndrina is a criminal clan of the 'Ndrangheta based in Cosenza, Calabria, Italy. It is allied with the Alvaro clan. The organization has been involved in extortion, public contract rigging, and vote-buying, with operations spanning from the 1980s to the present. Key members include Ettore Lanzino, who died in prison in 2024.
